description_en: Fukuoka may not be a Muslim-majority destination, but it welcomes Muslim travelers with real halal options. You'll find 4 halal restaurants and 2 mosques nearby, plus real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — everything to explore Fukuoka, Japan, with peace of mind.
metaDescription_en: Halal guide to Fukuoka: 24 halal restaurants listed, 2 mosques, prayer times and tips for Muslim travelers. Halal Trust Score 3.1/5.
